overall.description: A third-person game engine scene following an armored warrior with a round shield walking through a sunlit forest toward a river with a waterfall. The character traverses from a wooded trail down to a sandy riverbank and enters the shallow water, with steam rising from geothermal vents visible throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path carrying a spear and shield, approaching the river visible through the trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the forest path
large gray rock formations rising beside the river
wooden post with burning flame marking the path
flowing river visible through gaps in the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a dense pine forest. Sunlight filters through the canopy, casting dappled shadows on the path. A wooden torch post burns on the left as the river becomes visible through the trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge with geothermal river view

events.description: emerging from dense forest onto sandy riverbank with waterfall view

agents.ego_description: approaching the riverbank with increasing visibility of the waterfall and rising steam ahead

entered.detail: waterfall cascading down rocky cliff with mist rising
sandy shore along the river edge with scattered vegetation
large fallen tree trunks resting on the beach
geothermal steam rising from rocks near the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the character approaches the riverbank. A prominent waterfall comes into view with steam rising from geothermal vents. The ground transitions from dirt to sand as fallen logs appear on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach along geothermal river with waterfall

events.description: character steps from sandy bank into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore and stepping into the clear shallow water of the river

entered.detail: boulders scattered along the riverbank and in the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sandy beach with the waterfall and steam vents prominent in the background. Large rocks line the shore. The character then steps from the sand into the clear, shallow river water, continuing forward into the stream.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded pine forest that gradually opens into a bright, geothermal river landscape. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail under a canopy of dappled sunlight, passing a burning wooden torch post as the river first appears through the trees. As the forest thins, the scene expands to reveal a prominent waterfall and rising steam from geothermal vents, while the terrain shifts from dirt to a sandy bank dotted with fallen logs. The camera then follows the character across the sandy beach and past large shoreline rocks before finally stepping into the clear, shallow water of the stream.
